text: 2026-07-09: all 4 mlx native failures fixed. Two were test-contract drift: registration test predated the size-threshold gate in supports() (now asserts both regimes); rsvd bridge legitimately returns iter/mprod diagnostics beyond u/d/v (test now requires contract fields, allows diagnostics). chol-smoke exposed a REAL core export gap: as.matrix.amChol was defined but never exported/registered, so users could not materialize a resident amChol — now S3method-registered in core NAMESPACE. Also repaired roxygen source-of-truth: determinant.adgeMatrix S3method (aa1a39a had hand-edited NAMESPACE only) and amatrix_backend_status @export. mlx suite 114/0; R CMD check ERROR cleared (3 pre-existing WARNINGs remain, see metadata-pass issue).
